steps.title: Identify the operation blocking us
steps.content: The equation is $q - 34r = s$. Currently, $q$ has $34r$ subtracted from it. To isolate $q$, we need to undo this subtraction by adding $34r$ to both sides.

steps.title: Add 34r to both sides
steps.content:
Starting with $q - 34r = s$:
$$q - 34r + 34r = s + 34r$$
Simplifying:
$$q = s + 34r$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
